summary: Acting School feature fully tested and verified. All backend API endpoints working correctly (15/15 tests passed). Frontend UI displays school status, trainees, personal cast, and skill translations properly.
critical_code_review_comments: All 13 actor skills have Italian translations in SKILL_TRANSLATIONS (drama, comedy, action, romance, horror, sci_fi, voice_acting, improvisation, physical_acting, emotional_depth, charisma, method_acting, timing)
Keep dialog salary estimation uses actual skill values: $50K + (avg_skill * 500)/month - matches backend formula
Personal cast actors appear first in /api/actors with is_personal_cast=true and cost_per_film=0
Hidden talent and final_skills are properly hidden from frontend API responses
Training slot formula scales with school level: Level 1 = 1 slot, exponential growth
context_for_next_testing_agent: Acting School feature complete. User 'fandrex1@gmail.com' has: 1) cinema_school 'Scuola NeoMorpheus' at Level 1 with 1 slot, 2) 1 trainee 'Giulia Rossi' in training (0% progress), 3) 1 kept actor 'Marco Ferrari' in personal cast ($87,538/month salary). All 5 remaining recruits generated for today can be used for testing train flow. To test complete flow, trainee needs time to progress or MongoDB manual update to training_started.

GET /api/acting-school/status.details: Returns has_school=true, school_id, school_name, school_level, max_slots, available_slots, trainees[], kept_actors[]

GET /api/acting-school/recruits.details: Returns 5 recruits (1 used) with name, age, initial_skills (3-5 skills, values 5-25), is_promising, avatar_url. Hidden talent NOT exposed.

POST /api/acting-school/train.details: Training costs $200K, deducts from user funds, creates trainee with progress tracking

POST /api/acting-school/complete/{traine.details: Requires status='ready'. 'keep' action creates personal cast actor with cost_per_film=0, monthly_salary based on skills. 'release' adds to public pool.

GET /api/actors?limit=5.details: Personal cast actor 'Marco Ferrari' appears first with is_personal_cast=true, cost_per_film=0

Frontend Acting School page.details: Shows school header, In Formazione section with trainee progress, Cast Personale section with kept actor. All 13 skill translations displayed in Italian.

Skill Translations.details: All 13 actor skills translated: Dramma, Commedia, Azione, Romantico, Horror, Fantascienza, Doppiaggio, Improvvisazione, Recitazione Fisica, Profondità Emotiva, Carisma, Metodo Stanislavskij, Senso del Tempo

Keep Dialog Salary Estimation.details: Uses actual skill values: $50K + (avg_skill * 500)/month formula matches backend
